

Amaral, D.T., Bonatelli, I.A.S., Romeiro-Brito, M., Moraes, E.M. &
Franco, F.F. (2022) [Spatial patterns of evolutionary diversity in
cactaceae show low ecological representation within protected
areas](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.biocon.2022.109677). *Biological
Conservation*, **273**, 109677.

Ávila-González, H., González-Gallegos, J.G., Munguía-Lino, G. &
Castro-Castro, A. (2022) [The genus sisyrinchium (iridaceae) in sierra
madre occidental, mexico: A new species, richness and
distribution](https://doi.org/10.1600/036364422x16512564801641).
*Systematic Botany*, **47**, 319--334.

Carter, B.E., Misiewicz, T.M. & Mishler, B.D. (2022) [Spatial
phylogenetic patterns in the north american moss flora are shaped by
history and climate](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.14385). *Journal of
Biogeography*, **49**, 1327--1338.

Chen, K., Khine, P.K., Yang, Z. & Schneider, H. (2022) [Historical plant
records enlighten the conservation efforts of ferns and lycophytes'
diversity in tropical china](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jnc.2022.126197).
*Journal for Nature Conservation*, **68**, 126197.

Copilaș-Ciocianu, D., Sidorov, D. & Šidagytė-Copilas, E. (2022) [Global
distribution and diversity of alien ponto-caspian
amphipods](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10530-022-02908-1). *Biological
Invasions*, **25**, 179--195.

Fernandes, N.B.G., Yazbeck, G. de M. & Milward-de-Azevedo, M.A. (2022)
[Taxonomic diversity of passifloraceae sensu stricto along altitudinal
gradient and on serra dos órgãos mountain slopes in southeastern
brazil](https://doi.org/10.1590/2175-7860202273057). *Rodriguésia*,
**73**.

González-Orozco, C.E., Osorio-Guarín, J.A. & Yockteng, R. (2022)
[Phylogenetic diversity of cacao (theobroma cacao l.) genotypes in
colombia](https://doi.org/10.1017/s1479262123000047). *Plant Genetic
Resources: Characterization and Utilization*, **20**, 203--214.

González‐Orozco, C.E. & Parra‐Quijano, M. (2022) [Comparing species and
evolutionary diversity metrics to inform
conservation](https://doi.org/10.1111/ddi.13660). *Diversity and
Distributions*, **29**, 224--231.

Gosper, C.R., Percy-Bower, J.M., Byrne, M., Llorens, T.M. & Yates, C.J.
(2022) [Distribution, biogeography and characteristics of the threatened
and data-deficient flora in the southwest australian floristic
region](https://doi.org/10.3390/d14060493). *Diversity*, **14**, 493.

Griffiths, D. (2022) [Do the drivers and levels of isolation in fish
faunas differ across atlantic and pacific drainages in the
americas?](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.14358) *Journal of Biogeography*,
**49**, 930--941.

Gutiérrez-Rodríguez, B.E., Guevara, R., Angulo, D.F., Ruiz-Domínguez, C.
& Sosa, V. (2022) [Ecological niches, endemism and conservation of the
species in selenicereus (hylocereeae,
cactaceae)](https://doi.org/10.1007/s40415-022-00818-z). *Brazilian
Journal of Botany*, **45**, 1149--1160.

Gutiérrez-Rodríguez, B.E., Vásquez-Cruz, M. & Sosa, V. (2022)
[Phylogenetic endemism of the orchids of megamexico reveals
complementary areas for
conservation](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.pld.2022.03.004). *Plant
Diversity*, **44**, 351--359.

Moreira-Muñoz, A., Palchetti, M.V., Morales-Fierro, V., Duval, V.S.,
Allesch-Villalobos, R. & González-Orozco, C.E. (2022) [Diversity and
conservation gap analysis of the solanaceae of southern south
america](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpls.2022.854372). *Frontiers in Plant
Science*, **13**.

MURILLO-PÉREZ, G., RODRÍGUEZ, A., SÁNCHEZ-CARBAJAL, D., RUIZ-SANCHEZ,
E., CARRILLO-REYES, P. & MUNGUÍA-LINO, G. (2022) [Spatial distribution
of species richness and endemism of solanum (solanaceae) in
mexico](https://doi.org/10.11646/phytotaxa.558.2.1). *Phytotaxa*,
**558**, 147--177.

Olivares-Juárez, Ma.I., Burgos-Hernández, M. & Santiago-Alvarádo, M.
(2022) [Patterns of species richness and distribution of the genus
laelia s.l. Vs. Laelia s.s. (Laeliinae: Epidendroideae: Orchidaceae) in
mexico: Taxonomic contribution and conservation
implications](https://doi.org/10.3390/plants11202742). *Plants*, **11**,
2742.

Paz, A., Silva, T.S. & Carnaval, A.C. (2022) [A framework for near-real
time monitoring of diversity patterns based on indirect remote sensing,
with an application in the brazilian atlantic
rainforest](https://doi.org/10.7717/peerj.13534). *PeerJ*, **10**,
13534.

Rivera-Martínez, R., Ramírez-Morillo, I.M., De-Nova, J.A., Carnevali,
G., Pinzón, J.P., Romero-Soler, K.J., Raigoza, N. & Sánchez Salazar,
M.E. (2022) [Spatial phylogenetics in hechtioideae (bromeliaceae)
reveals recent diversification and
dispersal](https://doi.org/10.17129/botsci.2975). *Botanical Sciences*,
**100**, 692--709.

Silva, D.C., Oliveira, H.F.M., Zangrandi, P.L. & Domingos, F.M.C.B.
(2022) [Flying over amazonian waters: The role of rivers on the
distribution and endemism patterns of neotropical
bats](https://doi.org/10.3389/fevo.2022.774083). *Frontiers in Ecology
and Evolution*, **10**.

Wang, Q., Huang, J., Zang, R., Li, Z. & El-Kassaby, Y.A. (2022) [Centres
of neo- and paleo-endemism for chinese woody flora and their
environmental features](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.biocon.2022.109817).
*Biological Conservation*, **276**, 109817.

Yang, X., Qin, F., Xue, T., Xia, C., Gadagkar, S.R. & Yu, S. (2022)
[Insights into plant biodiversity conservation in large river valleys in
china: A spatial analysis of species and phylogenetic
diversity](https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.8940). *Ecology and Evolution*,
**12**.

Yang, X., Zhang, W., Qin, F., Yu, J., Xue, T., Huang, Y., Xu, W., Wu,
J., Smets, E.F. & Yu, S. (2022) [Biodiversity priority areas and
conservation strategies for seed plants in
china](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpls.2022.962609). *Frontiers in Plant
Science*, **13**.

Zhang, W., Bussmann, R.W., Li, J., Liu, B., Xue, T., Yang, X., Qin, F.,
Liu, H. & Yu, S. (2022) [Biodiversity hotspots and conservation
efficiency of a large drainage basin: Distribution patterns of species
richness and conservation gaps analysis in the yangtze river basin,
china](https://doi.org/10.1111/csp2.12653). *Conservation Science and
Practice*, **4**.

Zhang, X., Ye, J., Laffan, S.W., Mishler, B.D., Thornhill, A.H., Lu, L.,
Mao, L., Liu, B., Chen, Y., Lu, A., Miller, J.T. & Chen, Z. (2022)
[Spatial phylogenetics of the chinese angiosperm flora provides insights
into endemism and conservation](https://doi.org/10.1111/jipb.13189).
*Journal of Integrative Plant Biology*, **64**, 105--117.

Zhang, Y.-Z., Qian, L.-S., Chen, X.-F., Sun, L., Sun, H. & Chen, J.-G.
(2022) [Diversity patterns of cushion plants on the qinghai-tibet
plateau: A basic study for future conservation efforts on alpine
ecosystems](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.pld.2021.09.001). *Plant
Diversity*, **44**, 231--242.

Zhao, R., Xu, S., Song, P., Zhou, X., Zhang, Y. & Yuan, Y. (2022)
[Distribution patterns of medicinal plant diversity and their
conservation priorities in the qinghai-tibet
plateau](https://doi.org/10.17520/biods.2021385). *Biodiversity
Science*, **30**, 21385.
